Node started: Calculate or retrieve the theoretical value of the Delta_3 statistic for a Gaussian Unitary Ensemble (GUE) Hermitian matrix in the asymptotic limit. Specifically, find the value that represents the standard level of spectral rigidity for such matrices to compare against the provided 0.155 value.

Node started: Verify the known value of the Delta_3 statistic for the zeros of the Riemann zeta function. Confirm if the value 0.155 is the accepted measure of super-rigidity for these zeros and identify the mathematical reason why they are considered more rigid than standard GUE matrices.
